## Checklist

- [ ] Self-reviewed the code / content
- [ ] Markdown linting passes (`pixi run -e dev pre-commit run --all-files`)

- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No API keys or secrets committed
